one_time_description: Correction of an error (Note 25) affecting accumulated surplus and remeasurement gains/losses
economic_notes: Nation has investments in forestry, freight, outfitting, and energy businesses through partnerships. Kwadacha Natural Resources LP, Tse Keh Nay LLP, Claw Mountain Outfitters LLP, Three Feathers LP, KNGV Freight Services Joint Venture. Victoria Foundation Endowment Fund held for community benefit.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021, not 2024. Prior year figures restated due to correction of an error (Note 25) affecting accumulated surplus by $1,676,956 and remeasurement gains/losses. Nation consolidates 5 subsidiaries (0936269 B.C. Ltd., Kwadacha Settlement Negotiations Agreement, Kwadacha Community Store, Kwadacha Land Corp., Kwadacha Community Restaurant) and accounts for 5 GBEs/partnerships using modified equity method. Long-term debt total is partial as the note was cut off. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from available text. expenses_enterprises mapped to Own Source program expenses. Capital program expenses $2,326,078 and Settlement Negotiations $1,045,641 and Nation Member Trust $13,727 not mapped to standard categories.
